title: ++++ List of What Width & Offset Will Rub and What Won't ++++
author: aLiEn_sPoReZ
notes: Only page 1 scraped (36 posts). OP contains the reference table of wheel width/offset fitment calculations for 18-inch rims on GK Tiburon (stock hub-to-fender measurements, rub thresholds). Post #2 by staw512 contains a comprehensive fitment table organized by suspension setup (stock, Pro-Kit, Sportline, Tein S-tech, Tein Coilovers, Espelir, Tanabe, B&G, Dropzone). 13 expandable content blocks expanded. Forum metadata date 2024-12-27 may be last bump/edit; earliest reply dates are 2007-04-23.
